scripts.build: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const r=spawnSync('cargo',['--version'],{stdio:'pipe'});if(r.error&&r.error.code==='ENOENT'){console.warn('SKIP: cargo not found \u2014 skipping native build');process.exit(0)}const b=spawnSync(process.platform==='win32'?'npx.cmd':'npx',['napi','build','--platform','--release'],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(b.status||0)"
scripts.test: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const r=spawnSync('cargo',['test','--release'],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error&&r.error.code==='ENOENT'){console.warn('SKIP: cargo not found \u2014 install Rust from https://rustup.rs to run policy-core tests');process.exit(0)}process.exit(r.status||0)"
scripts.lint: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const r=spawnSync('cargo',['clippy','--','-D','warnings'],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error&&r.error.code==='ENOENT'){console.warn('SKIP: cargo not found \u2014 install Rust from https://rustup.rs to run policy-core lint');process.exit(0)}process.exit(r.status||0)"
